instruction_template:
TOOL CALL RULES: Respond with ONLY a JSON object. No markdown, no explanation. Format: {"name": "<tool_name>", "arguments": <arguments object>}. Always use "brightness_pct" (integer 0-100) for brightness. Available tools: {tool_desc}. Examples:
{example}
followup_hint: The previous tool call already executed. Reply with one short sentence about what happened. No JSON.
